topic: A fireplace bricked over years ago grows warm at night with the sound of a fire crackling behind it.
title: The Sealed Fireplace Is Still Burning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The fireplace in my living room was bricked shut decades ago, yet it is warm.
scenes.image_prompt: an old fireplace sealed with mismatched bricks in a dim living room, faint heat shimmer, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I bought the house knowing the chimney had been capped and filled.
scenes.image_prompt: exterior of an old house with a capped brick chimney against a gray sky, fog, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The bricks are cold all day.
scenes.image_prompt: a bricked over fireplace in flat daylight, plain mantel, soft shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But after midnight the whole wall radiates heat.
scenes.image_prompt: a sealed brick fireplace at night glowing faintly warm, dim room, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: And I can hear a fire crackling behind the brick.
scenes.image_prompt: close view of mortar between bricks with faint orange light leaking through, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I pressed my ear to it. Logs settling. Embers popping in the dark.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand pressed flat against warm fireplace bricks, faint glow at the seams, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drilled a small hole through the mortar one night.
scenes.image_prompt: a drill bit boring into fireplace mortar, dust falling, dim work light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Orange light poured out, and warm smoke that smelled of pine.
scenes.image_prompt: a thin beam of orange firelight escaping a drilled hole in dark bricks, faint smoke, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Through the hole I saw flames in a hearth that should not exist.
scenes.image_prompt: a tiny glimpse of a burning fireplace seen through a small hole in a brick wall, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then a hand reached out of the fire and patched the hole from inside.
scenes.image_prompt: a small patched spot of fresh mortar on a brick wall lit by faint orange glow, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A mason said the brick is two feet thick with nothing behind it.
scenes.image_prompt: a brick fireplace with a flashlight shining on solid mortar, no opening, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tonight the crackling is louder, and something keeps feeding a fire that cannot be there.
scenes.image_prompt: a warm bricked fireplace at night, faint orange seams brighter than before, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
